subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Most Glorious Beauty! Jináb-i-Mu'min hath, in his letter, made mention of you and offered boundless praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان جمال ابهی جناب مومن در نامه خویش ذکر شما را نموده و ستایش بی نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
